message:
fix(wolfram): expand self_check with live API probe and harden error types

Add self_check handler with live Short Answers API probe, retryable vs
failed classification, and evidence artifact collection. Expand error
type with ConfigValidation, SelfCheckFailed, SelfCheckRetryable, and
Timeout variants. Add Display and Error derives for the full error enum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
